overview: EventIQ is a smart event planning SaaS platform with a curtain landing page, intelligent vendor plan generator, dashboard, auth flows, and an AI-powered chat assistant — all running fully in the browser.
features: Curtain landing page with glass-morphism reveal animation
Smart planner with dual-handle budget slider and vendor multi-select
Intelligent plan generation (Best Fit, Standard, Least Fit) using hardcoded vendor database
Dashboard with saved plans from localStorage
Vendor setup form with services and pricing
Floating AI chat assistant with predefined replies
All logic runs offline — zero external API calls
